name: Balsamic Chicken
method: In a frying pan on medium heat, add 1 T olive oil and 1 T butter. Fry chicken legs until browned on all sides. Remove and set aside to drain on a paper towel. Whisk 1 cup balsamic vinegar, olive oil, honey, 1 T Dijon mustard, chopped shallot, salt, and pepper. Coat chicken legs in the marinade, and let sit for 45 minutes covered in the refrigerator. In the meantime, spray an 8-inch casserole dish with cooking spray to prevent sticking. Pour marinated chicken into casserole.Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until the meat pulling away from the bone. Serves 2-3. Serving suggestion: fresh bread, and mashed potatoes, pictured here garnished with green onion. I also sprinkled green onion on the chicken. Olé
